an5.29:1.1: “Monks, these are the five rewards for one who practices walking meditation.
an5.29:1.3: “He can endure traveling by foot; he can endure exertion; he becomes free from disease; whatever he has eaten & drunk, chewed & savored, becomes well-digested; the concentration he wins while doing walking meditation lasts for a long time.
an5.29:1.4: “These are the five rewards for one who practices walking meditation.”
